"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\overlay.dir/objects.a

C:\Users\ohimo\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WinGet\Packages\BrechtSanders.WinLibs.POSIX.MSVCRT_Microsoft.Winget.Source_8wekyb3d8bbwe\mingw64\bin\c++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\overlay.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o overlay.exe -Wl,--out-implib,liboverlay.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\overlay.dir\linkLibs.rsp
